themes.title: User Tracking and Compliance
themes.description: Implementing user tracking mechanisms while ensuring compliance with GDPR regulations.

themes.title: User Engagement and Preferences
themes.description: Enhancing user engagement through personalized recommendations and preference management.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the foundational features for user tracking and compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: All MVP features are implemented and tested, with user tracking and GDPR compliance verified.

milestones.name: V1 Completion
milestones.description: Enhance user engagement features and ensure data export capabilities.
milestones.success_criteria: All V1 features are implemented and tested, with user engagement metrics established.

milestones.name: V2 Completion
milestones.description: Implement cross-device tracking and ensure compliance for data export.
milestones.success_criteria: All V2 features are implemented and tested, with cross-device tracking operational.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful implementation of MVP features.
V2 features depend on the successful implementation of V1 features.

mvp.goal: Establish a robust user tracking and compliance framework.

v1.goal: Enhance user engagement through personalized features.

v2.goal: Implement advanced tracking capabilities across devices.
